FOR S. BRANDEN, AND H. HEMANI (IN PRO PER) PRESENT IN COURT. WITNESSES S/E, DOC EVID INTRO. MATTER SUBMITTED AND COURT SIGNED JUDGMENT LATER ON DATE OF HEARING.

New Calendar Date Set By The Court
Off Calendar Dec-13-2006 Set For Trial On Dec-14-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 602

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-15-2006 Text Ruling

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-13-2006 Continued To Dec-14-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Continued
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Donald F. Drummond, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
9:14am
Cause called for small claims appeal. Martha Huey, appears as representative for SF MUNI, appellant; Sun Joo Chung, Esq. appears for appellant Habib Hamani; Respondent, Shirley Branden, appears in Pro Per.
Ms. Chung requests a continuance so that the matter can be consolidated with Superior Court case #446767. A motion to consolidate is set for 10-25-06, 9:00am, in Dept. 301. The Court grants the motion to continue case to that date, when the motion to consolidate will be heard. Judge Drummond instructs Ms. Chung to alert Judge Warren to the fact that this case may need to go back to the Presiding Judge for a trial date, and to make sure this matter "follows" the others.
9:25am
Court adjourns. No new evidence was introduced or admitted.

RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HABIB HEMANI'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-06-028235(small claims appeal) WITH CASE CGC-05-446767.
APPEARANCE: Sun Joo Chung, Esq. of Ericksen, Arbuthnot, Kilduff, Day & Lindstrom, Inc. 510/832-7770 for deft & moving; April Reid, Esq. of Law Offices of Judith W. Marsh 510/444-4464 x324 for opposing party Shirley Branden; Matthew J. Rothschild, Deputy City Atty 554-3926 for City and County of San Francisco (observing).
RULING: The Court made a personal disclosure. No objections were made. The Court denied the motion without prejudice, insufficient service. (301/PJB/) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
